text:
oon.—The person will enjoy bodily happiness,
good health, jewels, he will command servants, all luxuries
will be obtained. His fame will increase.
Mars. — Suffers from thieves and poisons, there will
be eruptions all over the body, will be deprived of the
happiness of mother, father, etc., if Mars is in
conjunction with the 4th lord, 9th lord, etc. The mind will
be worried as a result of which health will be effected.
Rahu.—The person loses his senses and friends. The
body becomes emaciated. He will leave his house and
travel aimlessly. All relatives become enemies.

48 How to Judge a Horoscope
Jupiter. — Gets riches, clothes, equipment, etc. He
becomes happy. Health will become good. He will
command conveniences, he will practise exercises that
build up his constitution and health.
Saturn.—Reduced in health with cerebral complaints,
loses his position. If with the Moon, likelihood of insanity.
Becomes heterodox and irreligious. He will suffer from
windy complaints.
